sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pfizer's Talzenna/Xtandi Combo Improves Survival Outcomes In Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer - Pfizer  ( NYSE:PFE )
feed.summary: In mCRPC patients, Talzenna + Xtandi cut death risk by 20%, extending median OS to 45.8 months vs. 37.0 months with Xtandi alone. In HRR-mutated mCRPC, Talzenna + Xtandi reduced death risk by 38%, with a median OS of 45.1 months vs. 31.1 months for Xtandi alone.
